zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Loggesden於1528年出生在英國貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙沙時，她的父親John C Loggesden27歲，母親Julian23歲。她於大約1555年與John Birch在英國戴文奧維爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1611年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 斯特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Loggesden于1528年出生在英国貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙沙时，她的父亲John C Loggesden27岁，母亲Julian23岁。她于大约1555年与John Birch在英国戴文奧維爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1611年在英国英格兰貝德福爾享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可格亞特 斯特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Loggesden was born in 1528, in Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England, her father, John C Loggesden, was 27 and her mother, Julian, was 23. She married John Birch about 1555, in Offwell, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1611, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Great Chesterford, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Loggesden est née en 1528, à Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John C Loggesden, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Julian, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Birch environ 1555, à Offwell, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1611, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Great Chesterford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Loggesdenが1528年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアストレアトリー ウィス シャルペンhオシャルペンhオで生まれた時，父John C Loggesdenは27歳，母Julianは23歳であった。約1555年にイギリスデボンオフウエルでJohn Birchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1611年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト チェステルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Loggesden(이)가 1528년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John C Loggesden(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julian(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1555년 영국 데폰 프웰에서 John Birch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1611년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 체스터퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Birch aproximadamente 1555, em Offwell, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Loggesden родилась в 1528 г. в местности шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John C Loggesden было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Birch около 1555 г. в местности оффвелл, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1611 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности грит честирфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John Birch aproximadamente 1555, en Offwell, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas.
